flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at North Shore Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at North Shore Community College rose 29% between 2006 and 2009 (50.0% → 64.3%).
